absolute_difference_between_rows_over_ye: For rows "{query_row_label_a}" and "{query_row_label_b}", sum each row from {query_year_start} through {query_year_end}, inclusive. What is the absolute difference between those two sums?

Add the values for "{query_row_label_a}" from {query_year_start} to {query_year_end}, then add the values for "{query_row_label_b}" over the same years. What is the non-negative difference between the two totals?
Across the inclusive year interval {query_year_start} to {query_year_end}, what is the absolute gap between the total for "{query_row_label_a}" and the total for "{query_row_label_b}"?
Read the consecutive yearly values from {query_year_start} through {query_year_end} for "{query_row_label_a}" and "{query_row_label_b}". What is the absolute difference between their interval sums?
Compute each interval total over {query_year_start}-{query_year_end} for "{query_row_label_a}" and "{query_row_label_b}"; report the absolute difference.
sum_absolute_differences_between_rows_ov: For rows "{query_row_label_a}" and "{query_row_label_b}", compare the two rows year by year from {query_year_start} through {query_year_end}. What is the sum of the absolute yearly differences?
For each year from {query_year_start} to {query_year_end}, take the absolute difference between "{query_row_label_a}" and "{query_row_label_b}"; then add those differences. What is the total?
Across the inclusive year interval {query_year_start} to {query_year_end}, what is the sum of the year-by-year absolute gaps between "{query_row_label_a}" and "{query_row_label_b}"?
Read both rows from {query_year_start} through {query_year_end}. For each matching year, compute the non-negative difference, then report the sum of those differences.
Compute the absolute difference for "{query_row_label_a}" versus "{query_row_label_b}" in every year from {query_year_start}-{query_year_end}; what is the sum of those differences?
